베드로전서 5:1.content: Therefore I exhort the elders among you, as a fellow elder, and a witness of the sufferings of Christ, and who will also share in the glory that will be revealed.

베드로전서 5:2.content: Shepherd the flock of God which is among you, exercising the oversight, not under compulsion, but voluntarily, not for dishonest gain, but willingly;

베드로전서 5:3.content: not as lording it over those entrusted to you, but making yourselves examples to the flock.

베드로전서 5:4.content: When the chief Shepherd is revealed, you will receive the crown of glory that doesn’t fade away.

베드로전서 5:5.content: Likewise, you younger ones, be subject to the elder. Yes, all of you clothe yourselves with humility, to subject yourselves to one another; for “God resists the proud, but gives grace to the humble.”

베드로전서 5:6.content: Humble yourselves therefore under the mighty hand of God, that he may exalt you in due time,

베드로전서 5:7.content: casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.

베드로전서 5:8.content: Be sober and self-controlled. Be watchful. Your adversary, the devil, walks around like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may devour.

베드로전서 5:9.content: Withstand him steadfast in your faith, knowing that your brothers who are in the world are undergoing the same sufferings.

베드로전서 5:10.content: But may the God of all grace, who called you to his eternal glory by Christ Jesus, after you have suffered a little while, perfect, establish, strengthen, and settle you.

베드로전서 5:11.content: To him be the glory and the power forever and ever. Amen.

베드로전서 5:12.content: Through Silvanus, our faithful brother, as I consider him, I have written to you briefly, exhorting, and testifying that this is the true grace of God in which you stand.

베드로전서 5:13.content: She who is in Babylon, chosen together with you, greets you. So does Mark, my son.

베드로전서 5:14.content: Greet one another with a kiss of love. Peace be to all of you who are in Christ Jesus. Amen.
